articles.title: LIVE MN - Serie A, Milan-Atalanta (1-3): Pavlovic scores
articles.summary:
90' Six minutes of added time

90' Yellow also for Saelemaekers, who is also within a booking: he will miss Genoa

90' Estupinan is booked, he too was booked for a booking: he will miss Genoa

88' MILAN GOAL.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (1-3): Pavlovic closes the gap. String of yellows for AC Milan's players within a ban
articles.summary: The usual Strahinja Pavlovic scores the goal for the honor in the 88th minute.

articles.title: "Paolo alè, Paolo Maldini": San Siro sings for the historic captain with Milan three goals down
articles.summary: And in the end the chorus also arrived for Paolo Maldini at the end of an evening that started badly and ended worse, sportingly speaking.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-3): a goal in Fullkrug was disallowed for offside
articles.summary: No cheering this evening: in the 81st minute a goal against Fullkrug was disallowed for offside. The German did well to pounce on a loose ball after a backheel deflection from Nkunku following Estupinan's cross.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-3): an injured Bartesaghi out, Estupinan in
articles.summary: Last change for Milan. Davide Bartesaghi was out, injured while kicking the corner, Pervis Estupinan in, welcomed by the cold of a San Siro that had now emptied with each passing minute.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-3): Nkunku crossbar, no scoring today. Miracle of Carnesecchi
articles.summary: And today he just doesn't score. After Rabiot's post and the goal eaten by Leao, Nkunku's cross also arrives following a senseless miracle by Carnesecchi.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-3): now it's a bullfight. The rules are broken in a surreal San Siro
articles.summary: Surreal. It's the only word suitable to describe the last 10-15 minutes of the match at San Siro.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-3): triple change in Milan. Deafening whistles for Leao and his teammates
articles.summary: Massimiliano Allegri is trying in some way to give a shock to a team that no longer has any. In the 59th minute the Rossoneri coach opted for a triple substitution: Fullkrug, Athekame and Fofana on for Gimenez, De Winter and Leao.

articles.title: Third goal for Atalanta and the South doesn't like it: "You pissed us off." Then he leaves the stadium
articles.summary: And in the end it degenerated.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-3): Scrooge from Maignan. La Dea signs the trio with Raspdori
articles.summary: And the second half also follows the same score as the first.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-2): first change for Milan, Loftus out, Nkunku in
articles.summary: Upon returning from the locker room, Massimiliano Allegri immediately exploited the post slot for an offensive substitution.

articles.title: MN - Milan-Atalanta, the data on attendance at San Siro: 73,498 tickets sold
articles.summary: Milan has communicated the definitive data of the spectators present this evening at San Siro for the match against Atalanta, valid for the 36th matchday of Serie A: 73,498 tickets were sold, including season tickets.

articles.title: MN - Tsunami of boos from the entire stadium towards the team. At half-time Milan were down 2 goals, the fans were impatient
articles.summary: Incredible barrage of boos from the entire stadium towards the Rossoneri players, who in the first 45 minutes of the match against Atalanta offered a truly low level performance, both from a technical point of view and from the point of view...

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-2): answers were demanded. Well, these didn't arrive
articles.summary: After a week like this, the Rossoneri people demanded answers from the team, fresh from a series of results that were disappointing to say the least.

articles.title: MN - "Pull your balls out": the Curva Sud tries to wake up Milan
articles.summary: After a decidedly difficult first half, Milan were two goals down with Atalanta always entering the area with extreme ease, the Curva Sud began to target the team too.

articles.title: MN - Ibrahimovic was also present at San Siro for Milan-Atalanta
articles.summary: Management practically complete at the San Siro for this evening's match between Milan and Atalanta. According to what has been learned by the MilanNews editorial team.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-2): Leao booked. Received a booking, he will miss Genoa
articles.summary: The bad news continues in this evening that started badly and is continuing to get worse. In the 34th minute Rafael Leao was booked for a very late tackle on Scalvini which Zufferli did not forgive.

articles.title: MIL-ATA (0-2): Dea doubles their lead with Zappacosta, Milan are not there
articles.summary: Milan isn't there. In the 29th minute of the first half, Atalanta even went ahead by two goals thanks to Zappacosta's goal.
